title: gate-failure-context
description: Injected into versioned retry loop files when a gate fails. Provides the retry attempt with the context it needs to avoid repeating the same mistakes. Written into ralph loop frontmatter as gate_failure_context.

attempt.description: The failed attempt number that triggered this context injection

verdict_file.description: Relative path to the gate verdict JSON file for the failed attempt, e.g. gate-verdicts/phase-2-attempt-1.json

summary.description: One-sentence summary of why the gate failed. Injected as opening context for the retry.

loops_reverted.description: Loops whose outputs were invalidated by the gate failure and must be re-executed.

reason.description: Why this loop's outputs are invalid and must be re-executed

do_not_repeat.description: Explicit constraints for the retry attempt. Each entry is an actionable prohibition derived from gate findings.
